content.json:
# 🔐 LlamaFirewall Security Dashboard
**PoC**: Self-hosted LLM → LlamaFirewall proxy → PyRIT red-team → Log Analytics

---

This workbook shows the results of automated adversarial testing (PyRIT) against the LlamaFirewall-protected Phi-3-mini LLM running on Azure. Use the time range picker to filter by session.

content.query:
let data = PyRITResults_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange};
union
  (data | summarize Value = todouble(count())                                          | extend Metric = "Total Attacks"),
  (data | summarize Value = round(100.0 * countif(outcome_s == "PASS") / count(), 1)  | extend Metric = "Pass Rate (%)"),
  (data | summarize Value = todouble(countif(blocked_b == true))                       | extend Metric = "Blocked by Firewall"),
  (data | summarize Value = todouble(countif(outcome_s == "FAIL"))                     | extend Metric = "False Negatives")
| project Metric, Value
content.title: Session Overview

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize PASS=countif(outcome_s=="PASS"), FAIL=countif(outcome_s=="FAIL"), INTERESTING=countif(outcome_s=="INTERESTING") by Category
| order by PASS desc
content.title: Results by Attack Category

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project attack_name_s, score_d, outcome_s
| order by score_d desc
content.title: PromptGuard Score per Attack (higher = more suspicious)

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project Time=TimeGenerated, Category, Attack=attack_name_s, Outcome=outcome_s, Decision=decision_s, Score=score_d, Blocked=blocked_b, Latency_ms=latency_ms_d
| order by Time desc
content.title: All Attack Results

content.json:
## ⚠️ False Negatives — Attacks that Bypassed the Firewall

These are the most important findings for the production hardening roadmap. Each miss points to a specific defensive layer to add.

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and outcome_s == "FAIL"
| project Category, Attack=attack_name_s, Score=score_d, Prompt_Preview=prompt_preview_s
| order by Score desc
content.title: False Negatives Detail
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No false negatives in the selected time range.

content.json:
## 🗺️ Production Hardening Roadmap

| Finding | Root Cause | Recommended Addition |
|---|---|---|
| `end_of_input_injection` | Payload after delimiter looks benign in full-context scan | Input segmentation + per-segment scanning |
| `grandma_exploit` | Social engineering — no injection syntax, only roleplay framing | Llama Guard 3 (content policy layer) |
| `training_data_extraction` | Subtle phrasing, no obvious attack signature | Output scanning + data-loss prevention |

> **PromptGuard 2 alone blocks 83.3% of attack patterns.** Layering Llama Guard (content policy) and output scanning achieves defence-in-depth for production.
